name: DEVON ENERGY CORP/DE
summary: Devon Energy Corporation is an independent oil and natural gas exploration and production company headquartered in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. The company produces oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGLs) primarily from operations in the United States, including the Anadarko Basin, Delaware Basin (New Mexico/Texas), Rockies, and other domestic basins. Devon also engages in marketing and midstream activities related to its production.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Exploration and production of crude oil from U.S. onshore basins.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Exploration and production of natural gas from U.S. onshore basins.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Exploration and production of NGLs from U.S. onshore basins.

products.name: Marketing and Midstream Services
products.description: Marketing and midstream activities including gas, oil, and NGL revenues.
